title: Waveney, Lower Yare, and Lothingland Internal Drainage Board – notice of reconstitution
body: "The Environment Agency has submitted to the Department for Environment, Food and Rural Affairs a Scheme under Section 3 of the Land Drainage Act 1991 for:   the reconstitution of the Waveney, Lower Yare, and Lothingland Internal Drainage Board to reduce the number of elected members of the Board to 9 any matters relating to or following from that reconstitution    Published date: 3 April 2025.  Consultation period end date: 3 May 2025.  "
